reviews.comment:
Al ingresar, su no lo conoces parece faltó de estacionamiento, habría que poner carteles indicando que lis mismos están al fondo

(Translated by Google)
Upon entering, if you don't know it, it seems there is no parking, signs should be put up indicating that they are at the back.

reviews.comment:
Excelente parada para viaje largo. Baños limpios, tienda, aire gratis para las ruedas, restaurant.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent stop for a long trip. Clean restrooms, shop, free air for tires, restaurant.

reviews.comment:
Lo tradicional, buena estación, gente amable, siempre impecables los baños. Lo que lamento es que hayan sacado la máquinas gratuitas de agua.

(Translated by Google)
Traditional, good station, friendly people, and the restrooms are always spotless. My only regret is that they've removed the free water machines.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeDRmRUVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Fui muchas veces , el lugar y el servicio están muy buenos , lastima que cerraron 23.50 hs y no pudimos entrar , me parece que en época de vacaciones tendrían que estar 24 hs . Es una sugerencia

(Translated by Google)
I've been many times; the place and service are very good. It's a shame they closed at 11:50 pm and we couldn't get in. I think they should be open 24 hours during holiday periods. Just a suggestion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeC1tRUlBEAE
